title: 400 Bad Request due to newline character in WhatsApp template
symptom: When sending WhatsApp Business Cloud templates, n8n returns a '400 Bad Request' error. This occurs specifically when a variable value contains a newline character.
not_this_if: All variable values are free of newline characters
root_cause: The WhatsApp API does not accept newline characters in template variable values. Including such characters leads to a '400 Bad Request' response from the API.
fix_steps: Check the variable values in your WhatsApp template
Remove any newline characters from the end of the variable values
agent_instruction: Ensure that all variable values in the WhatsApp template do not contain newline characters.
